## Course Information {.unnumbered}

* Textbooks: [DS Book (Part 1)](https://rafalab.dfci.harvard.edu/dsbook-part-1/), [DS Book (Part 2)](https://rafalab.dfci.harvard.edu/dsbook-part-2/)
* GitHub: [Course Repository](https://github.com/ywanglab/STAT3000)
* Lecture Notes:  [website](https://ywanglab.github.io/STAT3000/)
* Additional Notes:
  - [SE For regression ](slides/standard_errors.qmd)
  - [SE for a proportion](slides/SE-proportion.qmd)
  - [QQ plot](slides/qq-plot.qmd)
  - [LOESS](slides/LOESS.qmd)

* Textbook: [OpenIntro Statistics](https://www.openintro.org/go/?id=os4_for_screen_reader&referrer=/book/os/index.php)
  - Chapter 3: Probability
    - [Slides](slides/chp3.pdf)
    - [Lab ](https://openintrostat.github.io/oilabs-tidy/03_probability/probability.html)  
    - [Source Code](https://github.com/OpenIntroStat/oilabs-tidy/tree/main/03_probability)
  


  - Chapter 8: Intro to Linear Regression 
    - [slides](https://www.openintro.org/book/os/) [PDF](slides/chp8.pdf)
    - [Lab/HW](https://openintrostat.github.io/oilabs-tidy/08_simple_regression/simple_regression.html) 
    - [Lab/HW Source](https://github.com/OpenIntroStat/oilabs-tidy/tree/main/08_simple_regression)
